english_script:
Hi guys, it's Ivy. Day 4 of my daily English practice. I keep talking to improve my oral English.

Today I watched a video about improving English by myself. The video shared some useful tips. It said the best way is to speak every day. Even if I make mistakes, it's okay. Another tip is to listen to simple podcasts. They help me learn new words. I also learned to read short articles aloud. This helps with my pronunciation. The speaker mentioned that I should not be afraid to repeat. Repeating helps me remember better. I can watch movies with subtitles too. That helps me understand natural speech. From this I learned that practice is more important than being perfect. I just need to keep going.

Thank you for listening, see you tomorrow.
chinese_translation:
大家好，我是Ivy。我的日常英语练习第四天。我不断说话来提高我的英语口语。

今天我看了一个关于如何自学提高英语的视频。视频分享了一些有用的技巧。它说最好的方法是每天都说。即使我犯错误也没关系。另一个技巧是听简单的播客。它们帮助我学习新单词。我还学会了大声朗读短文。这有助于我的发音。演讲者提到我不应该害怕重复。重复有助于我更好地记住。我也可以看带字幕的电影。这有助于我理解自然的语言。从中我学到，练习比追求完美更重要。我只需要继续前进。

谢谢聆听，明天见。
